scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,bot "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/bot"
scripts.dev:no-bot: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/bot
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/bot && npm run test -w apps/api
